metadata.status_reason: MSU International Law Review's website is a Squarespace brochure: navigation pages (about, exec board, symposia, submit). The print journal articles are not posted as PDFs anywhere on the site. The /new-blog collection holds ~100 short student-authored 'perspectives' web essays (HTML only, no PDFs) — these are real content but not law-review articles per se.

navigation.archive_path: no archive — page mentions 'Volume 31' but provides no link/PDF
navigation.notes: Probed 2026-05-08. Migration target from defunct digitalcommons.law.msu.edu. /publications and /publications-1 list no journal articles. /new-blog yields HTML perspectives essays via /new-blog/YYYY/M/D/<slug> — could be onboarded separately if HTML content is in scope. Squarespace JSON endpoint /new-blog?format=json-pretty returns a 433KB collection list of all blog items. Print journal likely on HeinOnline.
